creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: There are two iconv(3) implementations, one in libc and one in converters/libiconv.  The one in libc does not support translit.  If you need that just change USES=iconv into USES=iconv:translit.  It will make the port use libiconv.  The port Makefile and Uses/iconv.mk are otherwise fine I think.
